items.title: [正面] Been awhile since a gacha game had me invested in ...
items.summary: Been awhile since a gacha game had me invested in the story. The character designs are great, and the battle system is challenging but fair. If you get Pollux, he pretty much carries the team as he is a heavy damage dealer. Though, I have him set as my 2nd Team on mobile (yes, I'm a mobile player). Why, am I writing this on here instead of Google Play, don't worry about the details. Only thing you should worry about is trying the game for yourself, and experiencing the lore and gameplay. Coming back, to the game, and I am having a blast!

items.title:

結果把存著的所有石頭...
items.summary:
原本想著找個卡厄斯的代餐玩玩
沉下心來破完了第一章，存了些石頭，想著抽個專武用
結果把存著的所有石頭加上商店兌換全抽了，就一個金還歪了，吐了
PC端只有60FPS，優化也普通，遊玩過程總是莫名卡一下
有命座有專武，就算機率比一般米池高，但本質還是米池，不保底不出貨
